#fitspace r
#transform kmin 3.0
#transform kmax 15.0
#transform kweight 2
#transform dk 4.0
#transform window kaiser
#transform rmin 1.4
#transform rmax 3.0
#transform dr 0.0
#transform rwindow hanning
#transform nfft 2048
#transform kstep 0.05
#ndatasets 2
#epsilon_k 0.001
#var amp 0.8
#var del_e0 0.0
#var alpha 0.0
#var sig2_1 0.003
#var sig2_2 0.003

#nfree 203
#ndata 208
